page: Microsoft Azure DC4ads_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCadsv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 CPU architecture. The instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs allocated via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration includes 154 GB of local storage. Additionally, the instance is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external storage volumes. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or onboard GPU hardware, making it a CPU-only compute resource.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, the DC4ads_v6 offers a predictable resource profile for general-purpose workloads. The inclusion of local storage and Premium Storage compatibility provides flexibility for applications requiring moderate disk performance. This instance is suitable for workloads such as web serving, small to medium databases, application servers, and development environments.
description: Microsoft Azure DC4ads_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCadsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance includes 154 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for high-performance disk configurations. It does not contain any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. With its balanced resource allocation, this server provides a stable and predictable environment for general-purpose applications. It is well-suited for workloads such as web serving, application hosting, and small database deployments that benefit from dedicated CPU resources and local storage capacity.
